soft_skills: Ability to work independently and collaboratively

job_responsibilities: Design and develop the user interface of web applications using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Collaborate with the development team to ensure that the user interface meets the specified requirements and quality standards
Debug and resolve issues in the front-end code, including performance and usability issues
Participate in code reviews and contribute to the development of new features and functionality
Develop and maintain reusable UI components and libraries
Participate in the development and maintenance of the application documentation
Stay current with industry trends and developments in front-end development

questions.question: What is the primary function of the Jest testing framework in front-end development?

options.text: To bundle and minify code
To create reusable UI components
To debug and resolve performance issues
To write and run unit tests for JavaScript code

questions.question: Which of the following front-end frameworks is known for its virtual DOM and efficient rendering?

options.text: Angular
Vue.js
React
Ember.js

questions.question: What is the purpose of using a task runner like gulp or grunt in front-end development?

options.text: To write and run unit tests for JavaScript code
To debug and resolve performance issues
To automate repetitive tasks and workflows
To create reusable UI components

questions.question: What is the primary difference between CSS and JavaScript in front-end development?

options.text: CSS is used for styling, while JavaScript is used for layout
CSS is used for layout, while JavaScript is used for styling
CSS is used for styling, while JavaScript is used for dynamic behavior
CSS is used for dynamic behavior, while JavaScript is used for styling

options.text: Jest
Cypress

webpack

Reduced code complexity and improved readability
Increased memory usage and slower rendering
